title: hydatellaceae
intro: The hydatellaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a relatively small and distinct group of plants, consisting of a few species found in Australia and New Zealand. Hydatellaceae plants are typically aquatic or semi-aquatic and exhibit characteristics of both flowering plants and aquatic algae, such as having no true roots or leaves. The family hydatellaceae is of particular interest to botanists due to its unique adaptations to its aquatic environment.
